case_title: COLBERT DARE VS. SOUL LOUNGE, LLC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $75.00 SERVED JUN-22-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SOUL LOUNGE, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-30-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF COLBERT DARE AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE MICHAEL ROSEN, MANAGER AT SOUL LOUNGE, LLC. INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, AND DEFENDANT WAS UNWILLING TO WAIVE SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SERVICE CAN BE DONE AT 11 DUBOCE OFFICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
